## Checklist

- [ ] No runtime AI decision-making was introduced
- [ ] No AI-proposed fixture was promoted without human approval
- [ ] Money is represented as decimal strings at interchange boundaries
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries are updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets, caches, coverage databases, or generated environments are committed
